properties.verseOrder: v1 v1 v2 v3 v3 v4 v5 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, let Your light Light of Your face Shine on us

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: That we may be saved That we may have life To find our way In the darkest night Let your light shine on us

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Lord, let your grace Grace from Your hand Come over us

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: That we may be saved That we may have life To find our way In the darkest night Let Your grace come over us

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Lord, let Your love Love with no end Come over us

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: That we may be saved That we may have life To find our way In the darkest night Let Your love come over us Let Your light shine on us
